sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33613" key="e)leuqero/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλευθερό-παις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παιδος</itype>, <sense id="n33613.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having free children</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Βενέτων δῆμος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.359</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
